pageContext.name: Trinity War LED Mini-Poster Light
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Brandlite are proud to present the Trinity War LED Mini-Poster Light. This LED poster features the iconic art of the Trinity War, originally presented as a triptych between the covers of Justice League #22, Justice League of America #6, and Justice League Dark #22.  DC Comics LED Illuminated Poster Signs bring your favorite character to life with brightly lit inkjet print, embedded in a solid slimline Acrylic (PMMA) body.  The high-end posters illuminate the graphic and have a unique 'neon-style' edge glow that adds a magic atmosphere to any room in the house!  The LED sign is both safe and economical to use. For Indoor Use. Wall-mounted or suspended from the ceiling.
